sections.paragraph:
- Original: ὕστερον

- Transliteration: Husteron

- Phonetic: hoos'-ter-on

- Definition:

1. latter, later, coming after, the second

2. afterward, after this, later, lastly

- Origin: neuter of G5306 as adverb

- TDNT entry: 17:52,1

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Neuter

- Strong's: Neuter of G5306 as adverb; more lately that is eventually: - afterward (at the) last (of all).
